title: 4 Dividend Stocks Yielding 4.5%-Plus That Are Great Buys, According to Wall Street
text: The majority of analysts have a buy rating on these REITs. They offer dividends yielding more than 4.5% that analysts believe will grow over the next few years.

title: Apple Among 14 Companies To Announce Dividend Growth In Late April
text: Procter & Gamble extended its dividend growth streak to 67 years in the first two weeks of April with a 3% increase. Most of the increases I expected in the first half of April will actually occur in the upcoming week.
